required_spec: 21 in / 53 cm handpan shells, 1.0 mm DC04 low-carbon steel or approved stainless, no cracks or oil-canning
notes: Pre-drawn shells strongly preferred over first-time hand sinking

item: Gas nitriding or approved surface treatment
required_spec: Process compatible with 1.0 mm low-carbon handpan shells; supplier to confirm temperature cycle and distortion risk
notes: Skip only for stainless branch with separate validation

required_spec: Rigid circular support for 21 in shell, padded contact, stable under hammering
notes: Can be welded flat bar or CNC-cut plate/ring

required_spec: Removable Ding plus 8 oval field templates from current design table; acrylic, hardboard, or printed film
notes: Template is a layout aid, not final acoustic geometry

required_spec: Ball form and receiver dies for field dimples plus Ding forming support
notes: Radius set must be tested on scrap shell

required_spec: Small cross-peen, ball-peen, nylon/rubber mallet, polished faces
notes: Hammer faces must be smooth to avoid stress risers

required_spec: Chromatic strobe tuner, calibrated mic, audio interface or handheld recorder, FFT/spectrum software
notes: Existing shop equipment can satisfy this row

required_spec: High-strength flexible epoxy or handpan rim adhesive compatible with steel treatment and cure schedule
notes: Do coupon test before final shell closure

required_spec: 3.5 in ID edge trim, silicone/rubber ring, or rolled-safe finish
notes: No sharp Gu edge after deburring

required_spec: Non-abrasive cloths, alcohol wipe, protective oil for nitrided shell or stainless-compatible cleaner
22 in handpan bag/case with dense padding
notes: Protect tuned shell during settling and transport

required_spec: Low-cost steel practice shell or scrap formed areas for hammer/treatment trials
